节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the datetime of the enterprise devices.
注释信息: @namespace dateTimeManager
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@systemapi
@since 9

节点.功能描述: Sets the system time. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_SET_DATETIME
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { number } time - time indicates the target time stamp (ms).
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of setDateTime.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@systemapi
@StageModelOnly
@since 9

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
time indicates the target time stamp (ms).

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Disallow modify the system time. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.

节点.功能描述: Query the capability of modify the system time is allowed or disallowed. This function can be called by a super administrator. If the admin is not empty, it must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.

@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback - return true if modify datetime is not allowed.

@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

@systemapi
@StageModelOnly
@since 10
